name: Apricot Macaroon Cheesecake Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons toasted coconut or almonds OR
recipeInstructions:
Prepare pie crust according to pkg. directions for one crust filled pie, using 9-inch pie pan. (Or make single crust homemade pie crust.)
Preheat oven to 350°F.
In a large bowl, combine cream cheese and sugar. Beat until smooth. Add remaining filling ingredients. Beat until well blended. Pour into crust-lined pan.
In a small bowl, combine all topping ingredients. Mix well. Spoon teaspoons of topping evenly over filling. Bake at 350°F for 35-45 minutes or until top is golden brown and center is set. Cool completely. Garnish with whipped cream and coconut. Store in refrigerator.
